title: pallets/flask
script: Hello, developers. Ever wish you could create a web application in no time at all. Well, you are in luck today. Introducing Flask, the Go to Lightweight Web Application Framework for Python. Flask is a simple wrapper around Werkzeug and Jinja, allowing you to start building web apps quickly. It is flexible giving you the freedom to choose your dependencies and project layout. With Flask, you can add new features effortlessly thanks to a vibrant community that offers numerous extensions. So, whether you are a beginner or a seasoned pro, Flask has you covered. Let us make web development easy, efficient and enjoyable.

With Flask, you can add new features effortlessly thanks to a vibrant community that offers numerous extensions.

readmeData.description: A lightweight WSGI web application framework for Python.
